ui.title: MONKEY MIND
ui.subtitle: INNER INVADERS
ui.controls_touch: SWIPE TO MOVE   TAP TO CONFIRM

synapse_drone.name: Synapse Drone
synapse_drone.text: The most basic neural defense unit. These hovering spheres patrol the thought corridors, eliminating any unauthorized neural activity.
synapse_drone.observedBehavior: Descends in a straight line. Low health, low threat individually.

neuron_cluster.name: Neuron Cluster
neuron_cluster.text: A dense collection of interconnected neural nodes. Scientists theorize these form the basic building blocks of the mental prison.
neuron_cluster.observedBehavior: Slow descent, higher durability than drones.

cortex_auditor.name: Cortex Auditor
cortex_auditor.title: The Mind Inspector
cortex_auditor.description: Audits all neural traffic for unauthorized thoughts.

calm_shield.name: Calm Shield
calm_shield.description: Hold steady; let the mind settle.
